title: SovereignNetworkPermissionV0
description: PR-2 soft ACL contract: capability flags + deny list. trustScore is observational only — never execution authority.

allowSubscribe.description: May receive subscribed topics from counterparty.

allowBroadcast.description: May receive broadcast fan-out from counterparty.

allowPortalTransfer.description: May participate in portal pointer transfer initiated by counterparty.

denyList.description: Topic ids, event prefixes, or counterparty-derived keys to hard-deny regardless of allows.

trustScore.description: Optional heuristic; MUST NOT gate security decisions alone.
